title: anthoxanthum hirtum subsp. arcticum
intro: Anthoxanthum hirtum subsp. arcticum, also known as sweet grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is native to the Arctic tundra regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of sweet grass, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
